item.name: Ra'Kaznar Ring Coffer (IL 675)
item.description:
A weighty chest with ornate metallic filigree that suggests a valuable accessory lies within.

Required level: 98. IL: 675. Ring type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: Warrior of Light, Wrangler of Cats
